title: David Michael Beck
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|David|more=Michael}}
[[File:David_Michael_Beck.jpg|thumb|right|200px|David Michael Beck]]

'''David Michael Beck''' is a comic book cover artist. He created the several covers for [[Dark Horse Comics]]' for both the ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series. He also provided cover art for ''[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan (TPB)]]'' and ''[[Jedi Council: Acts of War (TPB)]]''.
